title: Audit ferrolearn-cluster vs sklearn (cluster + mixture + semi_supervised): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 4 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.cluster (KMeans, MiniBatchKMeans, BisectingKMeans, AffinityPropagation, MeanShift, SpectralClustering, AgglomerativeClustering, FeatureAgglomeration, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN, OPTICS, Birch, SpectralBiclustering, SpectralCoclustering), sklearn.mixture (GaussianMixture, BayesianGaussianMixture), sklearn.semi_supervised (LabelPropagation, LabelSpreading, SelfTrainingClassifier).

Related existing issues: #76-80 (SpectralBiclustering, SpectralCoclustering, estimate_bandwidth, OPTICS post-processing), #3 (oracle test failures: OPTICS, Birch)
